heading: Information with respect to foreign corporations engaged in U.S. business
label: 6038C Information with respect to foreign corporations engaged in U.S. business
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to (1) any requirement to furnish information under this section if the time for furnishing such information is after , (2) any requirement under subsec. (a) of this section to maintain records which were in existence on or after , (3) any requirement to authorize a corporation to act as a limited agent under subsec. children.text: such corporation shall furnish (at such time and in such manner as the Secretary shall by regulations prescribe) the information described in subsection (b), and

such corporation shall maintain (at the location, in the manner, and to the extent prescribed in regulations) such records as may be appropriate to determine the liability of such corporation for tax under this title as the Secretary shall by regulations prescribe (or shall cause another person to so maintain such records).
the information described in section 6038A(b), and
such other information as the Secretary may prescribe by regulations relating to any item not directly connected with a transaction for which information is required under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Penalty for failure to furnish information or maintain records
children.label: c Penalty for failure to furnish information or maintain records

children.text: any failure to furnish (within the time prescribed by regulations) any information described in subsection (b), and
any failure to maintain (or cause another to maintain) records as required by subsection (a),

children.heading: Enforcement of requests for certain records
children.label: d Enforcement of requests for certain records

children.heading: Agreement to treat corporation as agent
children.label: 1 Agreement to treat corporation as agent
children.text: The rules of paragraph (3) shall apply to any transaction between the reporting corporation and any related party who is a foreign person unless such related party agrees (in such manner and at such time as the Secretary shall prescribe) to authorize the reporting corporation to act as such related party’s limited agent solely for purposes of applying sections 7602, 7603, and 7604 with respect to any request by the Secretary to examine records or produce testimony related to any such transaction or with respect to any summons by the Secretary for such records or testimony. The appearance of persons or production of records by reason of the reporting corporation being such an agent shall not subject such persons or records to legal process for any purpose other than determining the correct treatment under this title of any transaction between the reporting corporation and such related party.

children.label: A
children.text: for purposes of determining the amount of the reporting corporation’s liability for tax under this title, the Secretary issues a summons to such corporation to produce (either directly or as an agent for a related party who is a foreign person) any records or testimony,

children.label: B
children.text: such summons is not quashed in a proceeding begun under paragraph (4) of section 6038A(e) (as made applicable by paragraph (4) of this subsection) and is not determined to be invalid in a proceeding begun under section 7604(b) to enforce such summons, and

children.label: C
children.text: the reporting corporation does not substantially comply in a timely manner with such summons and the Secretary has sent by certified or registered mail a notice to such reporting corporation that such reporting corporation has not so substantially complied,

children.heading: Applicable rules
children.label: 3 Applicable rules
children.text: If the rules of this paragraph apply to any transaction or item, the treatment of such transaction (or the amount and treatment of any such item) shall be determined by the Secretary in the Secretary’s sole discretion from the Secretary’s own knowledge or from such information as the Secretary may obtain through testimony or otherwise.

children.heading: Judicial proceedings
children.label: 4 Judicial proceedings
children.text: The provisions of section 6038A(e)(4) shall apply with respect to any summons referred to in paragraph (2)(A); except that subparagraph (D) of such section shall be applied by substituting “transaction or item” for “transaction”.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: e Definitions
children.text: For purposes of this section, the terms “related party”, “foreign person”, and “records” have the respective meanings given to such terms by section 6038A(c).
